title: pfaffia glauca
intro: Pfaffia glauca, also known as suma, is a type of plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family and is native to the Amazon rainforest. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Pfaffia glauca include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Herbal preparations of Pfaffia glauca can be found in the form of capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
